{{ $faq := .Site.GetPage "/faq/" -}}
# {{ .Site.Title }}

> Expert menopause care, for the whole you. Personalized virtual care that looks beyond symptoms - bringing together medical expertise and real-life understanding so you feel heard, supported, and more like yourself again.

Andrea, Nurse Practitioner, provides clinical support and treatment for perimenopause and menopause in a 1:1 format that considers the whole woman, not a collection of symptoms. Care is delivered virtually to women across Ontario.

- [Home]({{ .Site.BaseURL }}): {{ .Site.Home.Description }}

## Care

- [What We Treat]({{ $whatWeTreat.Permalink }}): The range of perimenopause and menopause symptoms we treat, and the evidence-based options available.
- [Core Perimenopause & Menopause Care]({{ $services.Permalink }}#core-care): Discovery calls, initial consultations, follow-up visits, and care check-ins.
- [Additional Support]({{ $services.Permalink }}#additional-support): Weight loss support and medical form completion.

## About

- [About Andrea]({{ $about.Permalink }}): Andrea's background, credentials, and approach to care.
- [FAQ]({{ $faq.Permalink }}): Answers common questions for both prospective clients (eligibility, pricing, how virtual visits work) and existing clients (follow-up care, rescheduling, side effects, and ongoing treatment).

## Get Started

- [Book a Visit]({{ .Site.BaseURL }}book/): Schedule a free Discovery Call or book an initial consultation.
{{ end -}}
